name: Merida Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Merida Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells bicycles and related parts in Taiwan, China, Hong Kong, and Europe. It offers machine bicycles, e-bikes, fitness bikes, road bikes, and trekking and city bikes, as well as bikes for youth, kids, and women. It also provides speedometers; handlebars, stems, grips and bartapes, pedals and quickreleases, saddles, seatposts and clamps, and EQ and spare parts; bags, backpacks, brackets, lights, pumps, bottles and cages, tools, and locks; and apparel, such as jerseys, shorts, jackets and vests, gloves, socks, and sunglasses. Merida Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Changhua, Taiwan.
